title: Ipoh unveils master plan to combat traffic congestion
snippet: The Perak government has launched the Traffic and Infrastructure Management Master Plan 2023-2033 for Ipoh. The plan includes an efficient traffic management system to handle the rapid increase in vehicles in the city center.

title: Ipoh Sentral expected to drive transformation with modern transport hub
snippet: Ipoh Sentral is set to become a modern transport hub, integrating ETS and Komuter services. In 2024, the Butterworth-Ipoh Komuter line saw a 29% increase in ridership, indicating a shift toward rail usage.

title: New Ipoh airport terminal to be ready by 2025
snippet: The expansion of the Sultan Azlan Shah Airport terminal is scheduled for completion in 2025, aimed at increasing passenger capacity to support Ipoh's growing population and tourism sector.
